name: Mr. Makhana Pudina Party Flavoured Makhana
description:
Made up of Makhana, Olive Oil, Spices, Lemon Powder, Mint Leaves, etc.
Act as an anti-oxidant
Gluten- free snacks
Light and easy to digest
Rich source of Calcium
Offers a tantalizing treat to your taste buds
Diet Preference: Gluten-Free
about:
Made up of Makhana, Olive Oil, Spices, Lemon Powder, Mint Leaves, etc.
Act as an anti-oxidant
Gluten- free snacks

Rich source of Calcium

ingredients: Makhana (Popped Lotus Seeds) 70%, Olive Oil 18%, Spices & Condiments 10% (Dried Ginger, Dried Mango, Dried Garlic, Green Chilli, Coriander Leaves, Cumin, Cardamom, Turmeric, Fennel, Black Pepper, Clove, Nutmeg, Mace, Carom Seeds), Salt, Sugar, Lemon Powder, Mint Leaves, Maltodextrin, Acidity Regulator (Citric acid E330), Flavour Enhancer (Disodium 5'- ribonucleotides E635).
